what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG line icon showing a document with a folded corner and an upward upload arrow inside it.
observations: Uses an SVG viewBox of 0 0 24 24 with explicit width and height of 24.
Sets fill to none and strokes to currentColor.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
Draws the document outline and folded corner in one path.
Draws the upload arrow with a vertical line and chevron-like arrowhead in a second path.
standouts: CurrentColor stroke makes the icon inherit surrounding color.
The icon combines file/document and upload-action imagery in a compact two-path SVG.
conventions: Uses inline SVG presentation attributes rather than CSS classes.
Uses path-only geometry with no embedded metadata or symbol wrapper.
concerns: No title, description, role, or aria attributes are present, so accessibility behavior depends on consuming code.
notes: A reusable file-upload icon asset rendered as a minimal currentColor stroke SVG.
questions: Should the consuming UI expose this icon to assistive technology or treat it as decorative?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a file upload icon, and the SVG depicts a document with an upload arrow.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a scalable file-upload glyph that can inherit color from its UI context.
contribution: Contributes a reusable file-upload line icon with document and upward-arrow semantics, compact SVG geometry, and color inheritance through currentColor.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24px currentColor SVG line icon depicting a document with a folded corner and an upload arrow.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing file upload actions in a themeable icon system.
